events.name: resource_strike
events.description: A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Dax Iron whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
